title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic's Fable | TechCrunch
summary: Treasury secretary Scott Bessent doubled down on his warnings to Chinese AI companies on Wednesday, saying that sanctions remain on the table after a White House official accused Moonshot of improperly distilling Anthropic’s Fable model.
caption: output/2026-07-22/treasury-threatens-sanctions-after-white-house-claims-moonshot-distill.txt
